description:
Software purpose-built for planning and building teams. All the tools you need to assess, compare, annotate and approve digital plans.


New
- Added highlight, underline, strikethrough and squiggly comment tools
- Added Copy Text and Properties to the comment menu
- Added ShowItem and ZoomFit script commands
Changes
- Changed to show highlighting for the selected highlight, underline, strikethrough or squiggly comment
- Changed to show the comment icon on the page before posting a click to add comment
- Changed to scroll to location for show comment
Fixes
- Changed circle measurement, line measurement, measurement and offset line annotations to use unit preferences for format
- Changed comment reply and edit controls to scroll into view when typed in if needed
- Changed so clicking anywhere on a comment page item will expand/collapse
- Changed so clicking outside a comment will deselect all comments
- Changed so only an unchanged default recession plane annotation uses format and rounding from unit preferences
- Changed the default horizontal cone of vision annotation to not use unit preferences
- Changed to select the comment containing a reply or edit control when the edit receives the focus
- Changing tools will cancel any in-progress tool based add comment
- Document Compare will cancel any in-progress comment add for the selected documents
- Fixed a crash when deleting a page containing the reply comment controls
- Fixed a crash when deleting or replacing a page with a comment being edited on that page
- Fixed a crash when using Make Annotations Permanent on a page containing the reply comment controls
- Fixed a crash when using Make Annotations Permanent on pages with comments in the background
- Fixed an error when saving some documents after deleting a comment
- Fixed an occasional memory leak when using the find panel with OCR
- Fixed clicking outside the arrow on a comment page item to collapse not removing reply/edit controls
- Fixed comment edit cancel and post buttons not always updating when the vertical scroll bar shows or hides
- Fixed comments already in the document not removing when using Make Annotations Permanent
- Fixed issues using Smart Stamping when there are unposted comment changes
- Fixed issues when PDF characters are outside of the page boundary
- Fixed memory issues with overlays
- Fixed memory leaks when XML parsing fails
- Fixed new comments not always scrolling into view when added
- Fixed non-PDF pages inserted into a PDF not showing comment changes until the document is saved
- Fixed using control while rectangle selecting comment text not updating until the control key is released
